examples: Some cases have been diagnosed as "cutaneous dysaesthesia".
Cutaneous malignant melanoma: a life-threatening malignant skin cancer.
Theclinical manifestations of TT leprosy are mainly cutaneous and neurologic.
Cutaneous, or an anthrax skin infection, is the most common and least severe form of the disease.
Antibiotics can be effective anthrax-killers in an infected person, especially if someone contracts cutaneous anthrax and gets prompt treatment.
